title: Adjacency entries = number of edges (the E in O(V+E))
statement_informal: In a directed graph stored as adjacency lists, the total number of adjacency entries equals the number of edges; with |V| = length g this is the basis of the O(V+E) traversal cost.
references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 4 / graph algorithms; the O(V+E) adjacency-list traversal bound.
